title: antirrhinum hispanicum var. oppositiflorum
intro: Antirrhinum hispanicum var. oppositiflorum, commonly known as the downy snapdragon, is a plant species within the snapdragon family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of the downy snapdragon lie in its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of using this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of the downy snapdragon typically involve infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
